type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Off-site disposal of n-hexane occurs as a result of transfer of contaminated soils, and disposal of produced water via injection into a disposal well.  Variability in the amount of annual n-hexane disposal is expected.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There were no unrecovered spills of cyclohexane containing substances in 2005.  In 2006 some portions of spilled volumes were reported as unrecovered resulting in losses to on-site soils.
